languages.text: "Лорд-капитан! Поселение Клеть атаковано, фиксируем активный вокс-обмен на частотах 32-го полка. Я уже дала знать о нашем прибы..."
"Lord Captain! The Cage is under attack. We are detecting active vox-communications on the 32nd Regiment's frequencies. I have already given word of our arriv—"
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан! Поселение Клеть атаковано, фиксируем активный вокс-обмен на частотах 32-го полка. Я уже дала знать о нашем прибы..."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! The Cage is under attack. We are detecting active vox communications on the frequencies of the 32nd Regiment. I have already given word of our arriv..."
"Lord Captain! The Cage is under attack. We are detecting active vox communications on the 32nd Regiment's frequencies. I have already given word of our arriv—"

"Lord Captain! The settlement is under attack. We are detecting active vox communications on the frequencies of the 32nd Merov Regiment. I have already sent word of our arriv—" {n}Vigdis is silent for a moment.{/n} "Incoming vox-transmission, but I cannot pinpoint the source of the signal."
"Lord Captain! The Cage is under attack. We are detecting active vox communications on the frequencies of the 32nd Regiment. I have already given word of our arriv..."
"Lord Captain! The Cage is under attack. We are detecting active vox communications on the 32nd Regiment's frequencies. I have already given word of our arriv—"
"Lord Captain! The Cage is under attack. We are detecting active vox-communications on the 32nd Regiment's frequencies. I have already given word of our arriv—"

languages.text: 「艦長様！コロニーが攻撃を受けています。32番メロウ連隊の通信が確認されました。我々の到着を伝える電報は既に送信済みですが…」{n}ヴィグディスはしばらく沈黙する.{/n}「受信電波が来ましたが、送信元の特定は困難です。」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! The settlement is under attack. We are detecting active vox communications on the frequencies of the 32nd Merov Regiment. I have already sent word of our arriv—" {n}Vigdis is silent for a moment.{/n} "Incoming vox-transmission, but I cannot pinpoint the source of the signal."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan! Kafes saldırı altında. 32. Alay'ın frekanslarında aktif voks iletişimleri tespit ediyoruz. Geldiğimizi çoktan bildir..."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! The Cage is under attack. We are detecting active vox communications on the 32nd Regiment's frequencies. I have already given word of our arriv—"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan! Kafes saldırı altında. 32. Alay'ın frekanslarında aktif voks iletişimleri tespit ediyoruz. Geldiğimizi çoktan bildir..."

languages.text: “舰长大人！牢笼正在遭受攻击。我们监测到梅罗夫第32团的音阵频段有活跃信号。我已告知我们即将抵——”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! The Cage is under attack. We are detecting active vox communications on the 32nd Regiment's frequencies. I have already given word of our arriv—"

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人！牢笼正在遭受攻击。我们监测到梅罗夫第32团的音阵频段有活跃信号。我已告知我们即将抵——”

languages.text: "Lord Captain! Der Käfig wird angegriffen. Wir haben eine aktive Vox-Kommunikation auf den Frequenzen des 32. Merov-Regiments. Ich habe unsere Ankunft bereits angek..."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! The Cage is under attack. We are detecting active vox communications on the 32nd Regiment's frequencies. I have already given word of our arriv—"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! Der Käfig wird angegriffen. Wir haben eine aktive Vox-Kommunikation auf den Frequenzen des 32. Merov-Regiments. Ich habe unsere Ankunft bereits angek..."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! La Cage est attaquée. Nous interceptons des communications-vox actives sur les fréquences du 32e régiment. J'ai d'ores et déjà annoncé notre arriv... »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! The Cage is under attack. We are detecting active vox communications on the 32nd Regiment's frequencies. I have already given word of our arriv—"

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! La Cage est attaquée. Nous interceptons des communications-vox actives sur les fréquences du 32e régiment. J'ai d'ores et déjà annoncé notre arriv... »

languages.text: «¡Lord Capitán! Están atacando la Jaula. Estamos detectando comunicaciones de voco activas en las frecuencias del 32.º regimiento. Ya he informado de nuestra lle...».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! The Cage is under attack. We are detecting active vox communications on the 32nd Regiment's frequencies. I have already given word of our arriv—"

traits.locale_text: «¡Lord Capitán! Están atacando la Jaula. Estamos detectando comunicaciones de voco activas en las frecuencias del 32.º regimiento. Ya he informado de nuestra lle...».
